data.title: Trophy Signature Homes opens Lowry Trails in Princeton, TX, expanding presence in fastest-growing city in the U.S. Model home now available for tours.
data.description: Trophy Signature Homes, a subsidiary of Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK), has launched Lowry Trails, a residential community in Princeton, Texas. This move bolsters Trophy Signature Homes' footprint in Princeton, acknowledged as the fastest-growing city in the U.S. The fully furnished model home is available for tours, offering potential buyers a glimpse into life in the community.

data.title: Emergent BioSolutions reaffirms commitment to combat opioid crisis by promoting awareness, education, and access to naloxone in Sept observances.
data.description: In Gaithersburg, Maryland on September 24, 2025, Emergent BioSolutions Inc. recommitted its efforts to combat the national opioid poisoning epidemic. The company, listed under NYSE as EBS, emphasized their focus on awareness, education, and widespread naloxone access. Specifically, they highlighted NARCAN ® Nasal Spray 4 mg and KLOXXADO ® (naloxone HCl) Nasal Spray 8 mg. This initiative aligns with several September observances targeting the opioid crisis.

data.title: American Crane dedicates new mural with ribbon-cutting ceremony in Douglassville, PA. Celebrating the dedication of ACECO's mural at headquarters.
data.description: In Douglassville, Pennsylvania, on September 24, 2025, the American Crane & Equipment Corporation (ACECO) hosted a ribbon-cutting event at its headquarters to unveil a new mural. The ceremony honored the dedication of ACECO's latest addition, with employees and community members in attendance. The mural signifies a significant milestone for ACECO in its commitment to art and local community engagement.

data.title: uniQure plans $200 million public offering with additional option to grant underwriters up to 15% more shares.
data.description: UniQure N.V., a prominent gene therapy company, based in Lexington, Mass and Amsterdam, made an announcement on September 24, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as QURE, has initiated a significant move by launching a $200 million underwritten public offering. This offering includes both ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants for the purchase of ordinary shares, targeted at investors with specific agreements. UniQure plans to exclusively offer all securities in this public offering. Moreover, the company is considering granting the underwriters a 30-day option to buy additional ordinary shares, up to 15% of the total number sold in the offering, including the ordinary shares linked to the pre-funded warrants. The success and details of the offering are subject to various factors, including market conditions. It is uncertain as to when or if the offering will be concluded, as well as the final size and conditions of the offering.

data.title: MillerKnoll (NASDAQ: MLKN) shares down post first-quarter results - adj earnings 45 cents/share, sales $955.7M, 8.2% rise in net sales to $961.8M, orders up 11.1% to $1.04B.
data.description: MillerKnoll, Inc. (NASDAQ: MLKN) saw a decrease in shares trading on Wednesday following the release of their first-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings of 45 cents per share, surpassing the projected 34 cents. Sales amounted to $955.7 million, exceeding the estimated $910.96 million. Net sales experienced an 8.2% increase from the previous year, reaching $961.8 million, with orders also rising by 11.1% to $1.04 billion. However, the gross margin decreased by 40 basis points. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CoreWeave CFO Nitin Agrawal to participate in Jefferies Virtual AI Summit on September 25, 10am PDT (1pm EDT).$core CRWV
data.description: CoreWeave Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV) revealed that Chief Financial Officer Nitin Agrawal is set to participate in the Jefferies Virtual AI Summit on September 25th at 10 a.m. PT (1 p.m. ET). The event will be available for live viewing and replay via CoreWeave’s Investor Relations website at investors.coreweave.com. The company utilizes its investor relations page and X platform for disclosure purposes.

data.title: Blaize to speak at Milken Institute’s Asia Summit in Singapore on Oct 1-3, 2025. Theme: “Progress with Purpose: Collaboration Amid Complexity.”
data.description: Blaize Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BZAI, NASDAQ: BZAIW), a prominent player in programmable, energy-efficient edge AI computing, has disclosed its involvement in a panel session at the Milken Institute 2025 Asia Summit, scheduled for October 1-3, 2025 in Singapore. The summit, themed "Progress with Purpose: Collaboration Amid Complexity," represents the 12th installment of the event. It serves as a platform that brings together influential companies and industries to foster cooperation and discussion on pressing issues. This year, the summit is expected to attract a significant number of participants and high-profile figures from various sectors.

data.title: Snowflake introduces Snowflake for Startups at Silicon Valley AI Hub, aiding in building enterprise-grade AI apps.
data.description: In Menlo Park, California, Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW), the AI Data Cloud company, introduced Snowflake for Startups at the launch of the Silicon Valley AI (SVAI) Hub. Building on the Powered by Snowflake initiative, Snowflake for Startups provides a platform for founders to develop and expand enterprise-level AI applications on Snowflake’s AI Data Cloud. This includes access to advanced product features, partnerships with prominent venture capital firms, and collaborative workspaces. The initiative aims to support startups in utilizing Snowflake's resources for growth and innovation.

data.title: Immuneering reports 86% overall survival at 9 months for first-line pancreatic cancer patients with Atebimetinib + mGnP.
data.description: Immuneering recently revealed impressive results, showing an exceptional 86% overall survival rate at 9 months for first-line pancreatic cancer patients treated with Atebimetinib combined with mGnP. This data highlights the effectiveness of this treatment approach in significantly prolonging the survival of patients battling pancreatic cancer. The results are promising and offer hope for improved outcomes in the treatment of this challenging disease.

data.title: Elcora updates on management cease trade order due to delays in financial filings since July 2025.
data.description: In Halifax, Nova Scotia on September 24, 2025, Elcora Advanced Materials Corp (TSX.V:ERA | Frankfurt:ELM0 | OTCQB:ECORF) shared an update regarding a management cease trade order issued on July 30, 2025, by the Nova Scotia Securities Commission under National Policy 12-203 - Management Cease Trade Order ("NP 12-203"). This order stemmed from delays in filing financial statements and management discussion for the fiscal year that ended on March 31, 2025. The company had previously disclosed reasons for these delays on July 14, 2025, and July 30, 2025. Furthermore, the filing of interim financial statements for the period ending on June 30, 2025, which were due on August 29, 2025, has also been delayed.

data.title: Inventiva to hold investor event on Oct 8, 2025, to discuss Phase 3 results for lanifibranor, focused on MASH treatment.
data.description: Inventiva, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company trading on Euronext Paris and NASDAQ under the symbol IVA, has disclosed plans for an upcoming analyst and investor event. The focus of the event will be to provide a strategic corporate update in anticipation of the Phase 3 trial results for lanifibranor, the company's primary asset targeting metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH). The event is scheduled to take place on October 8, 2025, from 11:30 am to 2:00 pm Eastern Time or 5:30 pm to 8:00 pm Central European Time in New York City. Those interested can also participate via live webcast.

data.title: Transocean is offering 100 million shares at $0.10 par value, with a 30-day option for the underwriters to purchase 15 million additional shares.
data.description: In Steinhause, Switzerland on September 24, 2025, Transocean Ltd. (NYSE: RIG) revealed plans for an underwritten public offering to sell 100,000,000 Transocean shares with a par value of $0.10 per share. The offering exclusively consists of shares from Transocean. Additionally, the company anticipates granting the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 15,000,000 more shares at the public offering price, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions.

data.title: Lattice Semiconductor to showcase edge AI innovation at FPGA Horizons Conference on October 7, 2025 in London. #AI #FPGA
data.description: Lattice Semiconductor, a leader in low power programmable technology, has confirmed its attendance at the FPGA Horizons Conference set to be held on October 7, 2025 in London, UK. The company will be actively involved in the event’s technical agenda, where it plans to present and exhibit a demo highlighting the progression of AI at the edge through its low power FPGA solutions. This marks an important opportunity for Lattice Semiconductor to showcase its advancements in this field.

data.title: NSA renews $20+ million contract with Cognyte, a tier-1 security agency in EMEA, for one-year support agreement.
data.description: In Herzliya, Israel, Cognyte has revealed that a tier-1 national security agency in the EMEA region has extended their support agreement for another year. The agreement is worth more than $20 million and underscores the agency's confidence in Cognyte's services.

data.title: GE HealthCare Technologies Inc (Nasdaq: GEHC) announces $0.035 per share dividend for Q3 2025, payable on Nov 14 to shareholders.
data.description: In Chicago, the Board of Directors of GE HealthCare Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: GEHC) announced a cash dividend of $0.035 per share of Common Stock for the third quarter of 2025. The dividend is set to be paid on November 14, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 24, 2025. GE HealthCare Technologies Inc., a prominent global healthcare solutions provider, specializes in medical technology, pharmaceutical diagnostics, and integrated, cloud-first AI-enabled solutions.
